case_title: INDEMNITY COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIF. CORP. vs. JONES, ROD LAROC et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF STAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF INDEMNITY COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIF. CORP.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-14-1995, CONTINUED TO SEP-14-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-14-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-14-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY PLAINTIFF DID NOT APPEAR TO PROVIDE COURT WITH A BANKRUPTCY STATUS, AND WHY THE COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-16-1995, CONTINUED TO APR-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR A BANKRUPTCT STATUS REPORT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INDEMNITY COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIF. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ROD LAROC DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-14-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-22-1995
